turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Hi, I'm calling

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of Pretty Good AI. I speak of a Daniel.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Hi, I'm Nadia Hassan. I need to do three things: book an appointment, get a medication refill, and confirm your office hours.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Please tell me your date of birth.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure, it's February 27th, 1985.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Yes, that's correct. Now, can we go ahead and set up that appointment first?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I have your name as Nadia Hassan, and your date of birth as February 27th, 1985. Is that correct?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: No problem, take your time.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: One moment.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Yes, that works for me. Please go ahead and use that.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Do you want to use the phone number on file to look up your record?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I have your phone number as 929-433-7408 and your date of birth is February 27th, 1985. Is that correct?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Actually, that’s not my number. Let me give you the correct one if you need it. But can we start with getting that appointment set?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Please give me the phone number you have on file.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure, the number on file should be 347-890-5620.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: All right, I’ll hold on.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Connecting you to a representative. Please wait.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Hello. You've reached the Pretty Good AI test line. Goodbye.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Wait, I'm just trying to book an appointment, get a refill, and confirm the office hours. Could we please go back and finish that?
